message:
test(spectral): expand proptest from 9 to 26 properties (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add SampleBuffer lifecycle (empty/push/full/to_vec), SpectralClassifier
lifecycle (ready/classify/reset), serde roundtrips for SpectralConfig,
AgentClass, SpectralPeak, psd_similarity invariants (self=1.0, bounded,
length mismatch), signal generators (sine/noise/impulse length + value
range), spectral_centroid non-negativity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
